sections.paragraph:
verb לשמש

to serve as, function as; wait upon

verb להשתמש

to use, exploit

verb להשמיש

to put into use, implement

verb לשמש (>>שימש)

to serve as, function as; wait upon

noun

attendant, servant, caretaker, lackey, scout, servitor, beadle

masculine and feminine noun

sun

masculine noun

auxiliary candle (for lighting in Hanukkah)
